message:
Command `# Detected deadlock: LibreLane not reading pipe:745653 (futex_wait), Yosys blocked on pipe_write
# Solution: drain the pipe externally to unblock Yosys, capturing missed output
echo "=== Draining pipe:745653 to unblock Yosys ==="
echo "Starting drain at $(date)"

# Read from LibreLane's read-end of the pipe (fd 11) to drain it
# This runs in background and captures any extra Yosys output
timeout 3600 cat /proc/214817/fd/11 >> /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null &
DRAIN_PID=$!
echo "Drain PID: $DRAIN_PID"

# Wait a moment then check if Yosys unblocked
sleep 10
echo ""
echo "=== Yosys state after drain start ==="
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane state ==="
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis log progress? ==="
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
stat "$SYNTH_LOG" | grep -E "Size|Modify"
tail -3 "$SYNTH_LOG"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Detected deadlock: LibreLane not reading pipe:745653 (futex_wait), Yosys blocked on pipe_write
# Solution: drain the pipe externally to unblock Yosys, capturing missed output
echo "=== Draining pipe:745653 to unblock Yosys ==="
echo "Starting drain at $(date)"

# Read from LibreLane's read-end of the pipe (fd 11) to drain it
# This runs in background and captures any extra Yosys output
timeout 3600 cat /proc/214817/fd/11 >> /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null &
DRAIN_PID=$!
echo "Drain PID: $DRAIN_PID"

# Wait a moment then check if Yosys unblocked
sleep 10
echo ""
echo "=== Yosys state after drain start ==="
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane state ==="
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis log progress? ==="
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
stat "$SYNTH_LOG" | grep -E "Size|Modify"
tail -3 "$SYNTH_LOG"", "timeout": 60}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Draining pipe:745653 to unblock Yosys ===
Starting drain at Fri May 29 10:25:50 +04 2026
Drain PID: 257778

=== Yosys state after drain start ===
    PID STAT %CPU %MEM     ELAPSED WCHAN
 216314 R     3.8  6.9       17:25 -

=== LibreLane state ===
    PID STAT %CPU %MEM     ELAPSED WCHAN
 214817 Sl    1.8  0.7       18:08 futex_wait_queue

=== Synthesis log progress? ===
  Size: 423528    	Blocks: 832        IO Block: 4096   regular file
Modify: 2026-05-29 10:09:04.248808409 +0400
    81/176: $21\d_invalid_32bit[0:0]
    82/176: $20\d_invalid_32bit[0:0]
    83/176: $19\d_invalid_32bit[0:0]

extras.command:
# Detected deadlock: LibreLane not reading pipe:745653 (futex_wait), Yosys blocked on pipe_write
# Solution: drain the pipe externally to unblock Yosys, capturing missed output
echo "=== Draining pipe:745653 to unblock Yosys ==="
echo "Starting drain at $(date)"

# Read from LibreLane's read-end of the pipe (fd 11) to drain it
# This runs in background and captures any extra Yosys output
timeout 3600 cat /proc/214817/fd/11 >> /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null &
DRAIN_PID=$!
echo "Drain PID: $DRAIN_PID"

# Wait a moment then check if Yosys unblocked
sleep 10
echo ""
echo "=== Yosys state after drain start ==="
ps -p 216314 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane state ==="
ps -p 214817 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis log progress? ==="
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
stat "$SYNTH_LOG" | grep -E "Size|Modify"
tail -3 "$SYNTH_LOG"
